description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from catwalk makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing.Heel: 3"UpperPatent leather strap for the forefoot Patent leather heel cupElasticated midfoot strapLightly padded footbed with embossed brandingOutsoleTPU outsole with a grooved rubber heel patch for the heelSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
